rationale: The cited constitutional provision concerns animal feed held for retail sale, not residence homestead exemptions. It imposes no constraint on adjusting the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The legislature by general law may exempt from ad valorem taxation tangible personal property consisting of animal feed held by the owner of the property for sale at retail.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
